refined_caption: A rodent is visible in a hospital room with yellow walls. The rodent appears to be in close proximity to patient care areas.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in my hospital room, which is completely unacceptable. The presence of rodents in a healthcare facility is a serious concern for patient safety and hygiene. I demand immediate attention to this issue.
voice_text: There's a rat in my hospital room, this is disgusting and I need someone to take care of it now.
